notes: Laukkanen et al. 2015, JAMA Internal Medicine; KIHD cohort, 2315 Finnish men; 4-7x/week sauna: 40% lower all-cause mortality, 50% lower cardiovascular mortality vs 1x/week; landmark study
Laukkanen et al. 2018, BMC Medicine; 1688 participants (51% women); confirms CVD mortality reduction in both men and women; extends original finding
2023 cohort study; sauna + low inflammation: additive protection on all-cause mortality; mechanistic link via CRP and inflammation pathways
